name: NavList
description: Vertical or horizontal navigation list landmark. Composes a <nav> with grouped or flat <li> children; consumers render <a aria-current=page> for the active item.

root.description: Navigation landmark wrapping the list. Renders <nav>.

item.description: Single list entry (<li>). Consumer renders an <a href> (and optional Badge) as children. Mark the active entry with aria-current=page on the anchor.

members.name: ariaLabel
members.description: Accessible label for the navigation landmark. Required when the page has more than one nav landmark.

keyboard.action: Move focus through nav items in DOM order.

usageHints: Use orientation=vertical for sidebar / drawer navigation; horizontal for top-bar nav.
Render the active item's <a> with aria-current="page" so assistive tech announces the current location.
When more than one navigation landmark exists on a page, provide a unique ariaLabel.
Pair item labels with Badge for trailing counts or status tags.

To group items under headings, render a sibling <li> with caption-styled text (e.g., a Text variant=overline) directly between groups of NavListItem. Group headings are app-level composition, not part of the NavList anatomy.
